title: Google’s 5 Day AI course!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Want to build the next generation of AI? This is the essential course of the year! Google and Kaggle are hosting a FREE, 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course (Nov 10th - 14th). Here you'll learn from Google's top researchers, and master the concept of AI Agents. Link in bio
